levels.name: Beginner - Home Row
levels.focus: Build comfort with the home row keys and light rhythm.

levels.name: Developing - Top Row
levels.focus: Reach for the top row while staying accurate.

levels.name: Developing - Bottom Row
levels.focus: Add the lower row with steady finger travel.

levels.name: Intermediate - Useful Words
levels.focus: Practice everyday words with speed and control.

levels.name: Advanced - Sentences
levels.focus: Type full sentences clearly and confidently.

examples.text: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
Blind learners can build speed through steady daily practice.
Strong typing opens doors to study, work, and independence.
